UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user account information, earnings, and payout preferences.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

balance.description: The user's current available balance in Naira.

pendingBalance.description: The user's pending balance from unverified reviews.

lifetimeEarnings.description: The total amount the user has ever earned.

payoutMethod.description: The user's preferred payout method (e.g., Bank Transfer, PayPal).

ReviewTask.title: Review Task
ReviewTask.description: A task assigned to a user to review a specific company.

/users/{userId}.description: User profile document containing balance and earnings data.

/submissions/{submissionId}.description: Collection of review submissions from users for verification.
